differential_diagnoses: Primary pleural lymphoma (e.g., DLBCL or MALT lymphoma)
Metastatic carcinoma (e.g., lung or breast cancer)
next_steps: Flow cytometry of pleural fluid for immunophenotyping
Pleural fluid cytology and cell block analysis
CT scan of the chest, abdomen, and pelvis with contrast
Pleural biopsy (via thoracoscopy or image-guided approach)
Serum protein electrophoresis with immunofixation and free light chain assay
Measurement of pleural fluid markers (ADA, LDH, pH, CEA)
